headline: Reklaim Credit Solutions Co-Founders Sam Fensterstock and Bob McCarthy Step Into Chief Revenue Officer and Chief Technology Officer Roles Ahead of Q3 2026 Launch
summary: Two of the most experienced operators in commercial credit risk and data engineering join the founding team of the first credit rating agency built for the state-regulated cannabis industryNEW YORK, June 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Reklaim Credit Solutions, Inc., a commercial credit rating and reporting agency purpose-built for the state-regulated cannabis industry, today announced that co-founders Sam Fensterstock and Bob McCarthy are stepping into executive leadership as Chief Revenue Officer

content.title: Reklaim Credit Solutions Co-Founders Sam Fensterstock and Bob McCarthy Step Into Chief Revenue Officer and Chief Technology Officer Roles Ahead of Q3 2026 Launch
